THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLON, CHRISTIAN ELLIOTT, ERIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 500 OAK STREET #7, S.F. $225.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $225.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-25-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:OOPM. THE ABOVE AMT OF $225- WILL BE DEDUCTED FROM DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. IF DEFT VACATES AND LEAVES THE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION ON OR BEFORE 3/25/97, DEFT TO PREPARE DOCUMENTS TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
